title: Chroma image model integration (Flash, balanced tier)
description: CONTINUE/HELPER card. Wire Chroma (Flux-family image model) into the app at the BALANCED tier using the Chroma Flash checkpoint. Three phases, one card (like MPI-4): (1) generation workflow — IN PROGRESS now; (2) upscaler — later; (3) detailer — later. Read brief.md.
